## Why It Works

I wanted to frame up "losing your time" in the most interesting way possible, so I decided to call it "the hidden cost of employment." That seemed to resonate deeply. The rest of the post is mobile-optimized (60% of LinkedIn readers are on their phones) to make scrolling and consuming as easy as possible.

## Template

The hidden cost of [COMMON SITUATION]:
[VALUABLE RESOURCE].
[NEGATIVE CONSEQUENCE 1].
[NEGATIVE CONSEQUENCE 2].
[NEGATIVE CONSEQUENCE 3].
[OVERALL IMPACT].
There's a different way.
It's not easy, but it's doable.
- [BENEFIT 1]
- [BENEFIT 2]
- [BENEFIT 3]
It's not about [MISCONCEPTION].
It's about [TRUE GOAL].
A [DESIRABLE OUTCOME] built through [MEANS].
I've taught [NUMBER]+ [TARGET AUDIENCE] how to [ACHIEVEMENT].
Get the playbook here: [YOUR LINK]
What's one step you're taking towards [ASPIRATIONAL GOAL]?

## Example

The hidden cost of traditional test prep.
Your confidence.
Most students cram for weeks.
Some lose sleep over practice tests.
Many sacrifice their extracurriculars.
Self-esteem plummets under pressure.
There's a different way.
It's not easy, but it's doable.
- Learn at your own pace
- Focus on your weak areas
- Integrate prep into your daily life
It's not about memorizing every fact.
It's about mastering the test-taking strategy without burning out.
A stress-free approach built through smart preparation.
I've taught 5,000+ students how to boost their SAT scores by 200+ points.
Get the playbook here: [YOUR LINK]
What's one step you're taking towards acing the SAT?
